name: Trench Crusade
description:
WARNING: THIS IS EXTREMELY DARK

This is mainly for the forces of hell, who are VERY fucked up.

"Trench fighting is the bloodiest, wildest, most brutal of all... None of the war's exciting moments is so powerful as the meeting of two stormtroop leaders between narrow trench walls. There's no mercy there, no going back, the blood speaks from a shrill cry of recognition that tears itself from one's breast like a nightmare."

During the Crusades a heretical band of Templars dared defy the Almighty and, casting aside their sacred vows, unleashed the forces of Hell upon the Earth. Over 800 years later, in the Year of Our Lord 1914, this brutal, merciless war between Heaven and Hell rages on. This is not just a fight for survival but a cataclysmic struggle that will decide the very fate of humanity's soul.

Or will you fight for hell? For Mammon or for the Lord of Flies? Do you dare to travel to Jerusalem to venture unto the Gate and be judged by Satan to become one of his sons and daughters?

An unforeseen future nestled somewhere in time.

Unsuspecting victims no warnings, no signs.

Judgment day the second coming arrives.

Before you see the light you must die!

please for the love of GOD do not use JLLM with this
creator: brogus¾
